'''fapafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnophyid|pycnophyid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnophyid|pycnophyid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fapafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæpæfæth|fæpæfæth]] || [[word:fæpæfæj|fæpæfæj]] || [[word:fæpæfæsh|fæpæfæsh]] || [[word:fæpæfæ|fæpæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fapapafath|fapapafath]] || [[word:fapapafaj|fapapafaj]] || [[word:fapapafash|fapapafash]] || [[word:fapapafa|fapapafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fapafath|fapafath]] || [[word:fapafaj|fapafaj]] || [[word:fapafash|fapafash]] || [[word:fapafa|fapafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fapaffath|fapaffath]] || [[word:fapaffaj|fapaffaj]] || [[word:fapaffash|fapaffash]] || [[word:fapaffaf|fapaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fapafatha|fapafatha]] || [[word:fapafaja|fapafaja]] || [[word:fapafasha|fapafasha]] || [[word:fapafaka|fapafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fapafath|fapafath]] || [[word:fapafaj|fapafaj]] || [[word:fapafash|fapafash]] || [[word:fapafa|fapafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fapafathal|fapafathal]] || [[word:fapafajal|fapafajal]] || [[word:fapafashal|fapafashal]] || [[word:fapafakal|fapafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fapafathatha|fapafathatha]] || [[word:fapafajaja|fapafajaja]] || [[word:fapafashasha|fapafashasha]] || [[word:fapafaka|fapafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fapafathan|fapafathan]] || [[word:fapafajan|fapafajan]] || [[word:fapafashan|fapafashan]] || [[word:fapafakan|fapafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fapafathaoro|fapafathaoro]] || [[word:fapafajaoro|fapafajaoro]] || [[word:fapafashaoro|fapafashaoro]] || [[word:fapafakaoro|fapafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
